DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF LUIS AVILA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR DOCUMENT PRODUCTION, FOR AN ORDER THAT ALL OBJECTIONS ARE DEEMED WAIVED AND FOR AN ORDER DEEMING ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED IS GRANTED, EXCEPT AS TO OBJECTIONS BASED UPON PRIVILEGE. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THE REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $890, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Pltf'S Motion For Issue, Evidence, Or Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions Of $3440.00
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:RISHI UHANNA, ESQ for defendant and opposing party Rugstan Inc.; no other appearance stated

PLAINTIFF LUIS AVILA's Motion For Issue, Evidence, Or Terminating Sanctions, And Monetary Sanctions is granted as it seeks monetary sanctions. The late compliance was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $1,102.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Set For Trial On Dec-13-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-24-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: E. Michael Linscheid, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case scheduled for Case Management Conference on 4/16/2010 at 9:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Document Production; For An Order That All Objections Are Deemed Waived; For An Order Deeming All Admissions Admitted; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Parviz Darabi, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: LUIS AVILA
Margaret E. Murray, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Rugstan Inc., Ali Patnoo and Rishi Khanna

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF LUIS AVILA's Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Document Production, For An Order That All Objections Are Deemed Waived And For An Order Deeming All Requests For Admission Admitted is granted, except as to objections based upon privilege. Defendant is ordered to respond to the Form and Special Interrogatories and the Request For Documents within 20 days of notice of this order. The failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $890, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-08-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Continued To Jan-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
